summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of Edamen Media. Backend: 23/23 pytest tests passed (health, config, auth, applications CRUD + filters + stats, contact, unauthorized access). Frontend: all 8 public routes load without console errors; contact form submits with success toast; multi-step apply form validates step 1 (name+email required), supports next/back across all 6 steps, and submits returning success screen; admin login + dashboard with stats, search, status filters, drawer open, notes save, and delete all work via REST.
critical_code_review_comments: Status-change button data-testids use lowercase+dashed form (e.g., set-status-reviewing, set-status-call-scheduled). Review request mentioned 'set-status-*' which works; just document the exact case for downstream consumers.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'). Consider migrating to lifespan context manager for FastAPI >=0.95.

models.py default for Application.id uses uuid4 default_factory per-instance which is fine, but ContactMessage.email type EmailStr requires email-validator — already in requirements; verified working.
Backend public POST /api/applications returns 200 instead of 201 (per FastAPI default with response_model). Acceptable but 201 would be more idiomatic for resource creation.

Frontend /apply step navigation only validates required fields on step 0; later required-like fields (e.g., primary platform) are not enforced. By design (all optional after basics), but worth confirming with PM.
test_credentials: admin@edamenmedia.com / EdamenAdmin#2026 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md, auto-seeded on backend startup)
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_-prefixed applications and contact messages during pytest run and Playwright runs; all cleaned up by end of test_delete_application. One residual contact message (TEST_Contact / TEST_Contact2 / TEST_UI_User) may remain; backend has no public contact deletion endpoint so they were left in DB but use TEST_ prefix for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at https://edamen-framework.preview.emergentagent.com/api. Admin seeded user works. Google Sheets sync is intentionally disabled (sheets_enabled=false) and verified to no-op. Apply form has 6 steps; only step 1 has client-side validation (full_name + email). Drawer status buttons: data-testid='set-status-<status-lowercased-dashed>' (e.g., set-status-reviewing, set-status-call-scheduled).
